positive: A vibrant, highly detailed illustration of a geometric celestial landscape. Focus on a majestic, stylized crescent moon cradling a glowing constellation map, surrounded by abstract nebula clouds in deep indigo, electric cyan, and vivid gold. Incorporate clean, sharp linework and clean silhouettes reminiscent of Art Deco celestial motifs, but with a modern, graphic pop aesthetic. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed to look impactful and visually balanced when printed on apparel. Include subtle stardust elements and radiating lines of energy. Flat graphic design meets complex cosmic imagery. Highly contrasting colors, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, dirty background, muted colors, grayscale, realism
